category_sources: source_facts.description: Create beautiful applications using Go; Wails official docs describe building applications with Go and web technologies.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name: wails; official docs and homepage brand the project as Wails.
docs_sources: Official Wails documentation site under wails.io/docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/wailsapp/wails; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
